name: Albacore
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the ocean early morning or late evening
description: Prefers temperature edges where cool and warm water meet.

name: Anchovy
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the ocean
description: A small silver fish found in large schools.

name: Angler
obtainMethod: Rod fishing north of JojaMart on the wooden plank bridge (level 3 fishing required)
description: Uses a bioluminescent dangler to attract prey.

name: Blobfish
obtainMethod: Submarine ride at the Night Market (Winter 15-17)
description: This odd creature floats above the ocean floor, consuming any edible material in its path.

name: Blue Discus
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the river on Ginger Island
description: A brightly colored tropical fish that is popular in aquariums.

name: Bream
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in rivers at night
description: A fairly common river fish that becomes active at night.

name: Bullhead
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the mountain lake
description: A relative of the catfish that eats a variety of foods off the lake bottom.

name: Carp
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the mountain lake and sewers
description: A common pond fish.

name: Catfish
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in rivers on rainy days
location: Town River, Forest River, Secret Woods, Witch's Swamp
description: An uncommon fish found in streams.

name: Cave Jelly
obtainMethod: Rare catch while fishing in the mines (floors 20, 60, and 100)
description: A rare jelly found in underground lakes.

name: Chub
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in rivers, mountain lake, and forest pond
description: A common freshwater fish known for its voracious appetite.

name: Clam
obtainMethod: Crab pot placed in the ocean, or found as beach forage
description: A bivalve with a gritty texture found on the beach.

name: Cockle
obtainMethod: Crab pot placed in the ocean
description: A common saltwater clam.

name: Crab
obtainMethod: Crab pot placed in the ocean
description: A popular seafood delicacy caught in crab pots.

name: Crayfish
obtainMethod: Crab pot placed in freshwater
description: A small crustacean caught in freshwater crab pots.

name: Crimsonfish
obtainMethod: Rod fishing off the east pier on the beach (level 5 fishing required)
description: Lives deep in the ocean but likes to lay its eggs in the warm summer water.

name: Dorado
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the forest river during summer days
description: A fierce carnivore with brilliant orange scales.

name: Eel
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the ocean on rainy evenings
description: A long, slippery little fish.

name: Flounder
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the ocean
description: It lives on the bottom, so both eyes are on top of its head.

name: Ghostfish
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in underground lakes in the mines (floors 20 and 60)
description: A pale, blind fish found in underground lakes.

name: Glacierfish
obtainMethod: Rod fishing at the south end of Arrowhead Island (level 6 fishing required)
description: Builds a nest on the underside of glaciers.

name: Glacierfish Jr.
obtainMethod: Rod fishing at Arrowhead Island during Qi's Extended Family quest (level 6 fishing required)
description: The original Glacierfish had a son...

name: Goby
obtainMethod: Rod fishing at forest waterfalls
description: Some types of Gobies can climb up waterfalls.

name: Halibut
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the ocean early morning or late evening
description: A flat fish that lives on the ocean floor.

name: Herring
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the ocean
description: A common ocean fish found in large schools.

name: Ice Pip
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the frozen lake on mines floor 60
description: A rare fish that lives in the icy underground lakes.

name: Largemouth Bass
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the mountain lake
description: A popular fish that lives in lakes.

name: Lava Eel
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the lava lake on mines floor 100
description: It can somehow survive in pools of red-hot lava.

name: Legend
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the mountain lake on a rainy spring day (level 10 fishing required)
description: The king of all fish! They said he'd never be caught.

name: Legend II
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the mountain lake during Qi's Extended Family quest (level 10 fishing required)
description: The successor to the original Legend.

name: Lingcod
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in rivers
location: Town River, Forest River, Mountain Lake
description: A fearsome predator that will eat almost anything it can cram into its mouth.

name: Lionfish
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the ocean around Ginger Island
description: An aggressive, predatory fish with venomous spines.

name: Lobster
obtainMethod: Crab pot placed in the ocean
description: A large crustacean caught in crab pots.

name: Midnight Carp
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in rivers and mountain lake at night
location: Forest Pond, Mountain Lake, Ginger Island Rivers
description: This shy fish only feels comfortable at night.

name: Midnight Squid
obtainMethod: Submarine ride at the Night Market (Winter 15-17)
description: A deep-sea squid only available during the Night Market submarine ride.

name: Ms. Angler
obtainMethod: Rod fishing north of JojaMart during Qi's Extended Family quest (level 3 fishing required)
description: Uses a bioluminescent dangler to attract prey.

name: Mussel
obtainMethod: Crab pot placed in the ocean, or found on the beach
description: A small bivalve collected from ocean crab pots or beach rocks.

name: Mutant Carp
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the Sewers (requires Rusty Key)
description: The strange waters of the sewer turned this carp into a monstrosity.

name: Octopus
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the ocean in the morning
description: A mysterious and intelligent creature.

name: Oyster
obtainMethod: Crab pot placed in the ocean, or found on the beach
description: A savory bivalve collected from the sea.

name: Perch
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in all bodies of water
location: Town River, Forest River, Forest Pond, Mountain Lake
description: A freshwater fish of the winter.

name: Periwinkle
obtainMethod: Crab pot placed in freshwater
description: A tiny sea snail that can be caught in freshwater crab pots.

name: Pike
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in rivers and forest pond
location: Town River, Forest River, Forest Pond
description: A freshwater fish that's difficult to catch.

name: Pufferfish
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the ocean on sunny days around noon
description: A puffy fish that only appears on bright sunny days.

name: Radioactive Carp
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the Sewers during Qi's Extended Family quest
description: A carp that spent one too many years in toxic sludge.

name: Rainbow Trout
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in rivers and mountain lake on sunny days
location: Town River, Forest River, Mountain Lake
description: A freshwater trout with colorful markings.

name: Red Mullet
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the ocean during the day
description: Long ago these were kept as pets.

name: Red Snapper
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the ocean on rainy days
description: A popular fish with a nice red color.

name: River Jelly
obtainMethod: Rare catch while fishing in freshwater locations
description: A rare jelly found in freshwater.

name: Salmon
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the river
description: Swims upstream to lay its eggs.

name: Sandfish
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the desert oasis
description: A rare fish found in the desert oasis.

name: Sardine
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the ocean
description: A common fish found in great numbers. Useful for many recipes.

name: Scorpion Carp
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the desert oasis
description: A venomous carp found in the desert. Hard to catch.

name: Sea Cucumber
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the ocean during the day
description: A slippery, slimy creature found on the ocean floor.

name: Sea Jelly
obtainMethod: Rare catch while fishing in saltwater locations
description: A rare jelly found in the ocean.

name: Shad
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in rivers on rainy days
description: Lives in a school at sea, but returns to the rivers to spawn.

name: Shrimp
obtainMethod: Crab pot placed in the ocean
description: Tiny crustaceans with a delicate flavour, caught in ocean crab pots.

name: Slimejack
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the Mutant Bug Lair
description: He's coated in a very thick layer of slime. He keeps slipping out of your hands!

name: Smallmouth Bass
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in rivers and ponds
description: A freshwater fish that is very sensitive to pollution.

name: Snail
obtainMethod: Crab pot placed in freshwater
description: A slow-moving creature caught in freshwater crab pots.

name: Son of Crimsonfish
obtainMethod: Rod fishing off the east pier on the beach during Qi's Extended Family quest (level 5 fishing required)
description: He hatched in the warm summer water, and followed in the footsteps of his father.

name: Spook Fish
obtainMethod: Submarine ride at the Night Market (Winter 15-17)
description: A wide-eyed deep-sea fish rarely seen near the surface.

name: Squid
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the ocean at night
description: A wide-eyed creature of the deep sea, only active at night.

name: Stingray
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in Pirate's Cove on Ginger Island
description: Despite having a toxic stinger, these fish are shy and prefer to avoid humans.

name: Stonefish
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in underground lakes in the mines (floor 20)
description: A tough, spiny fish camouflaged as a rock.

name: Sturgeon
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the mountain lake
description: An ancient bottom-feeder with a dwindling population. Females can live up to 150 years.

name: Sunfish
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in rivers on sunny or windy days
description: A common river fish.

name: Super Cucumber
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the ocean at night
description: A rare, purple variety of sea cucumber.

name: Tiger Trout
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in rivers (rare)
description: A rare hybrid of brown and brook trout with a striking pattern.

name: Tilapia
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the ocean during the day
description: A primarily vegetarian fish that prefers warm water.

name: Tuna
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the ocean
description: A large fish that lives in the ocean.

name: Void Salmon
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the Witch's Swamp
description: A salmon, twisted by void energy. The fresh meat is jet black, but rapidly turns pink when exposed to air.

name: Walleye
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in rivers and lakes on rainy fall nights
location: Town River, Forest River, Forest Pond, Mountain Lake
description: A freshwater fish caught at night.

name: Woodskip
obtainMethod: Rod fishing in the Secret Woods pond
description: A very sensitive fish that can only live in pools deep in the forest.
